item.title: Phase equilibrium measurements and thermodynamic modeling of aqueoussolutions of polyamines CO2 absorbents: 3-aminopropylmethylamine,3-aminopropyldimethylamine and N,N-diethyl 1,3-propanediamine attemperatures from 273 K to 363 K
